BOLSIG+ version: 03/2016
Collision input data:
--------------------------------------------------
Ar                                                              
LXCat-June2013.txt
How to reference in publications:
1) Yamabe, Buckman, and Phelps, Phys. Rev. 27, 1345 (1983). Revised Oct 1997
2) PHELPS database,http://www.lxcat.laplace.univ-tlse.fr, retrieved June 4, 2013.
 
 
 
 Transport coefficients
A1     Mean energy (eV)                                                
A2     Mobility *N (1/m/V/s)                                           
A6     Diffusion coefficient *N (1/m/s)                                
A11    Energy mobility *N (1/m/V/s)                                    
A12    Energy diffusion coef. D*N (1/m/s)                              
A13    Total collision freq. /N (m3/s)                                 
A14    Momentum frequency /N (m3/s)                                    
A16    Total ionization freq. /N (m3/s)                                
A18    Townsend ioniz. coef. alpha/N (m2)                              
A20    Power /N (eV m3/s)                                              
A21    Elastic power loss /N (eV m3/s)                                 
A22    Inelastic power loss /N (eV m3/s)                               
A23    Growth power /N (eV m3/s)                                       
A27    Maximum energy                                                  
A28    # of iterations                                                 
A29    # of grid trials                                                
          R#    E/N (Td)      A1          A2          A6         A11         A12         A13         A14         A16         A18         A20         A21         A22         A23         A27         A28         A29
